common.tagline: Feel the world in real time

home.headline: Feel every goal with the entire world
home.subtext: The first app in the world that shows on a map how every country reacts to every play of the 2026 World Cup. Live. In real time.
home.ctaSubtext: No download. No signup. One tap and you react.
home.howStep1Desc: Jump into any live World Cup match and choose your country.
home.howStep2Desc: Tap a button when something happens: goal, robbery, save, golazo. One tap.
home.howStep3Desc: Your reaction appears on the world map in real time. See how the entire planet reacts.
home.whatDescription: Matchfeel is the World Cup's second screen. While watching the match with your phone in hand, you tap a button and your reaction joins a global map in real time. You see Argentina explode with a goal, Brazil frustrated by a missed penalty, the entire world vibrating together. There's nothing like it.
home.featureLiveMapDesc: Every reaction paints a country. The map updates every 5 seconds. Two layers: intensity (who reacts most) and sentiment (what they're feeling). Tap a country to see what's happening there.
home.featureReactionsDesc: No typing needed. One tap, one emotion. Goal, golazo, robbery, save, red card, missed it, penalty, qualified. Built for the speed of football.
home.featureReceiptDesc: When the match ends, you get a visual summary of everything you lived. Your reactions, your moments, your country vs the world. Share it in one tap.
home.featureChatDesc: Chat with fans from around the world during the match. Auto-moderated to keep the vibe. Disappears 24 hours later.
home.finalCtaSecondary: or sign in to save your reactions and get receipts

receipt.title: Your Receipt
receipt.noReactions: You didn't react in this match

matches.title: All matches
matches.subtitle: All 72 group stage matches of the 2026 World Cup

profile.noReceipts: No receipts yet. React in a match to get your first receipt.
